title: In-situ water management: Key rural prosperity and sustainable development through watersehed mangement in rainfed areas
abstract: Over the past 20 years, the proportion of the world's hungry people has declied from one fifth to one-sixth,while the absolute number of hunger people has fallan silghly. The problem is acute in Asia, where most of the 852 million poor in the world who are malnourished live, particularly in India(221 million) and China(142 million(Sanchez et al.2005)...
